holdings.infoBox: DEHP is an equity ETF with a total of 767 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 13.06%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 8.34%, Samsung Electronics Co Ltd DR at 3.93%, Tencent Holdings at 3.20%, and MediaTek at 2.96%.

overview.description: The Dimensional Emerging Markets High Profitability ETF (DEHP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively selects large-cap emerging markets companies exhibiting high profitability characteristics, seeking to provide long-term capital appreciation. DEHP was launched on Apr 27, 2022 and is issued by Dimensional.
